title: Ubiquiti UDR - UniFi Dream Router
description: Ubiquiti UniFi Dream Router is a all-in-one network solution for homes and small offices. It is a powerful device with a 2-core CPU, 2GB RAM and combines a Router, WiFi 6 AP, 4-port switch with 802.3af PoE on two ports, UniFi Controller / Protect / Access / Talk and storage for UniFi Protect. The icing on the cake of this design router is a small display to show current network traffic. The built-in Dual Band WiFi AP supports the latest 802.11ax standard with a modulation rate of 2402 Mbps in… Dual Band WiFi 6 AP with 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ac/ax support, 2402 (4Ã4 MU-MIMO) + 600Mbps (4Ã4 MIMO) (4) Gigabit LAN - 2 ports with PoE-out support (802.3af) + (1) Gigabit WAN PoE budget 32 W 128GB internal storage for UniFi Protect logs 0.96" LCD color display for network traffic and load MicroSD card slot - required at least 128 GB or more Management via UniFi Controller , web interface of the router and UniFi Network mobile applications from version 6.17.0 (iOS) or 3.8.5 (Android) Zero Handoff Roaming - seamless transition between APs Wireless uplink (useful where you can't get a data cable) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest Network Load balance - maintaining a balanced load/switching clients Speed limit for each SSID Device Powe cord MicroSD Card Removal Tool
